recommendation.description: EndpointSlice represents a subset of the endpoints that implement a service.For a given service there may be multiple EndpointSlice objects, selected by labels, which must be joined to produce the full set of endpoints.
PodDisruptionBudget is an object to define the max disruption that can be caused to a collection of pods

A Helm chart to install Webapp graphql engine in a Kubernetes cluster.

The API Traffic Analyzer for Kubernetes

{"CVSS": {"redhat": {"V3Score": 8.4, "V3Vector": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}}, "Layer": {}, "PkgID": "util-linux-extra@2.38.1-5+b1", "Title": "util-linux: CVE-2024-28085: wall: escape sequence injection", "Status": "fixed", "PkgName": "util-linux-extra", "Severity": "HIGH", "VendorIDs": ["DSA-5650-1"], "DataSource": {"ID": "debian", "URL": "https://salsa.debian.org/security-tracker-team/security-tracker", "Name": "Debian Security Tracker"}, "PrimaryURL": "https://avd.aquasec.com/nvd/cve-2024-28085", "References": ["http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/5", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/6", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/7", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/8", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/9", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/28/1", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/28/2", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/28/3", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2024-28085", "https://github.com/skyler-ferrante/CVE-2024-28085", "https://github.com/util-linux/util-linux/security/advisories/GHSA-xv2h-c6ww-mrjq", "https://lists.debian.org/debian-lts-announce/2024/04/msg00005.html", "https://mirrors.edge.kernel.org/pub/linux/utils/util-linux/", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-28085", "https://people.rit.edu/sjf5462/6831711781/wall_2_27_2024.txt", "https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-6719-1", "https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-6719-2", "https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2024-28085", "https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2024/03/27/5"], "image_name": "docker.io/bitnami/clickhouse:24.2.2-debian-12-r0", "Description": "wall in util-linux through 2.40, often installed with setgid tty permissions, allows escape sequences to be sent to other users' terminals through argv. recommendation.rule_name: Ensure that the cluster-admin role is only used where required
recommendation.rule_description: The RBAC role cluster-admin provides wide-ranging powers over the environment and should be used only where and when needed
The Kubernetes API stores secrets, which may be service account tokens for the Kubernetes API or credentials used by workloads in the cluster

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize wildcard use in Roles and ClusterRoles
recommendation.rule_description: Kubernetes Roles and ClusterRoles provide access to resources based on sets of objects and actions that can be taken on those objects. It is possible to set either of these to be the wildcard "*" which matches all items

recommendation.rule_name: Ensure that Service Account Tokens are only mounted where necessary
recommendation.rule_description: Service accounts tokens should not be mounted in pods except where the workload running in the pod explicitly needs to communicate with the API server

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of privileged containers
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers to be run with the securityContext.privileged flag set to true

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers wishing to share the host process ID namespace
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers to be run with the hostPID flag set to true.

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers wishing to share the host network namespace
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers to be run with the hostNetwork flag set to true

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers with allowPrivilegeEscalation
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers to be run with the allowPrivilegeEscalation flag set to true

recommendation.rule_name: Apply Security Context to Your Pods and Containers
recommendation.rule_description: Apply Security Context to Your Pods and Containers

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of HostPath volumes
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally admit containers which make use of hostPath volumes

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers which use HostPorts
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers which require the use of HostPorts

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of root containers
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers to be run as the root user

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers with the NET_RAW capability
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers with the potentially dangerous NET_RAW capability

recommendation.rule_name: Ensure that the seccomp profile is set to docker/default in your pod definitions
recommendation.rule_description: Enable docker/default seccomp profile in your pod definitions

recommendation.rule_name: The default namespace should not be used
recommendation.rule_description: Kubernetes provides a default namespace, where objects are placed if no namespace is specified for them

recommendation.rule_name: Minimize the admission of containers with capabilities assigned
recommendation.rule_description: Do not generally permit containers with capabilities
